name: insurance fraud investigators processing 5–15 claims/month tool
description: For insurance fraud investigators processing 5–15 claims/month, inefficient identification of fraudulent patterns causes delayed investigations. We provide automated flagging of suspicious claims instead of manual review of claims.
problem_solved: Identifying fraudulent claims in a timely manner
